issue_title: fix: resolve version modal not closing
issue_body_preview:
## Summary

Fixes the version history modal not closing when clicking the Close or X buttons. The `closeVersionHistory` function (and other modal functions) were undefined because the HTML was loaded via `innerHTML`, which does not execute embedded `<script>` tags.

## Changes

- After inserting ver
test_description_zh: 打开版本历史模态框，然后点击关闭按钮（Close 按钮或右上角 X 按钮），观察模态框是否正常关闭。
expected_result_zh: 点击 Close 按钮或 X 按钮后，版本历史模态框应立即关闭，页面恢复到正常状态，不会出现模态框无法关闭的情况。
